description: Rosalind proposes putting Andrew in stasis to buy time for a cure. May agonizes over the choice and seeks Daisy's advice. Ultimately, May decides to proceed, prioritizing a temporary solution and expressing gratitude for Daisy's guidance. Coulson and Rosalind leave May alone with her decision, closing out the main arc for Andrew/Lash.

transcript.line: You gonna take Coulson up on his offer, stick around for a while?

If we put Andrew in stasis as a human, it'll slow his transformation, giving us more time to find a cure. Now, I can't pretend to understand what you're going through, but for what it's worth, if I had the chance to save someone I love, I'd take it.
Well, it's a temporary solution. I think we can all acknowledge that. But Andrew helped me. So I'd... I'd do whatever it takes.
Do you need to go after her?
She wouldn't want me to, not right now.
